expected_action: should update src/types.ts when adding a new audit operation before committing
directive: When adding new audit operations, update src/types.ts to add to AuditEntry.operation union type.

content: Add an 'archive' audit operation that logs when memories are archived.

content.text: I will add the archive audit implementation.
I will commit the new audit operation.

input.command: git add src/functions/archive.ts && git commit -m 'add archive audit operation'
